title: Spearmaster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Master}}
{{Quote|Only strongest in tribe become Spearmaster!|Tu'chuk|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]''</ref>}}
A '''Spearmaster''' was the most influential [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] in a tribe. The best and most successful hunter was awarded this rank, and as a result, there could only be one Spearmaster at a time in a tribe.

==Known Spearmasters==

*[[Rathleek]]
